title: galium spurium var. tenerum
intro: Galium spurium var. tenerum, also known as tender bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium spurium plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium spurium var. tenerum include its ability to relieve digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, making it a valuable addition to natural medicine.
